title: The Eucharist.
content:
He that is hurt seeks help: sin is the wound;
    The salve for this i' th' Eucharist is found.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Eucharist."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
